notes: Nutrition data researched via web search from FatSecret, Nutritionix, EatThisMuch, Amazon, and manufacturer sites.

items.name: G Hughes Sugar Free Lemon Herb Marinade
G Hughes Sugar Free Teriyaki Marinade
G Hughes Sugar Free Orange Ginger Marinade
Oscar Mayer Naturally Hardwood Smoked Bacon (Regular)
Oscar Mayer Turkey Bacon
items.notes: Values vary by variety (58% Less Fat version: 35 cal, 1.5g fat per 2 slices). Standard Oscar Mayer Turkey Bacon shown here.

items.name: Happy Belly (Amazon Fresh) Plain Nonfat Greek Yogurt

per_2_tbsp_approx.notes: Calculated from 3/4 cup (170g) label. Great sour cream replacement: sour cream is ~60 cal / 6g fat per 2 tbsp vs ~16 cal / 0g fat for nonfat Greek yogurt.

items.name: G Hughes Sugar Free Ranch Dressing

comparison_notes.bacon_swap: Regular bacon (90 cal, 7g fat) vs Turkey bacon (60 cal, 4.5g fat) = 30 cal savings, 2.5g less fat per 2 slices. Oscar Mayer 58% Less Fat Turkey Bacon drops to 35 cal, 1.5g fat.
comparison_notes.sour_cream_swap: Regular sour cream (~60 cal, 6g fat per 2 tbsp) vs Nonfat Greek yogurt (~16 cal, 0g fat per 2 tbsp) = 44 cal savings, 6g less fat. Plus 3g protein bonus.
comparison_notes.marinades: All 3 G Hughes marinades are extremely low cal (5-10 cal per tbsp) with 0-1g carbs, 0g sugar. Excellent for adding flavor without calories. Lemon Herb has slight fat (0.5g) from canola oil.
